discrepancies.title: T2B v3.0 arXiv-category-primary assumption
discrepancies.drafter_position: Drafter §1.4 + §2.B assumed math.HO primary + math.NT cross-list for T2B v3.0 arXiv staging (mirroring Monatshefte für Mathematik journal categorization)
discrepancies.synth_position: Q-208-1(c) reasoning: DS873D is math.NT-only endorsement; T2B with math.HO primary structurally incompatible with DS873D ride. Recommended FLIP to math.NT primary + math.HO cross-list for arXiv submission (independent of Monatshefte journal categorization), if paper's content supports that framing
discrepancies.resolution: REFINED — operator must judge T2B v3.0 abstract framing: (a) if math-history/pedagogical-exposition lead → math.HO correct + T2B incompatible with DS873D ride (defer until separate math.HO endorsement); (b) if trans-identity/arithmetic lead → math.NT correct + T2B rides DS873D cleanly. Decision flows into §B Step B-2.0b pre-flight
discrepancies.downstream_impact: Step B-2 (T2B arXiv staging) now has 2-stage pre-flight: B-2.0a Z6 Zenodo verify (Q-208-6) + B-2.0b math.NT-primary framing determination (Q-208-1c). T2B is most pre-flight-laden §B item per cross-question Interaction 1

discrepancies.title: R1 → JFR fire gating not pre-stated in drafter's §B/§D plan
discrepancies.drafter_position: Drafter §D (cascade-deployment window Day 14-21) listed R1 → JFR fire as ungated on R4 verdict status
discrepancies.synth_position: Q-208-2 LOCK NEEDS_R1_GATED_ON_R4_VERDICT (HIGH confidence): firing R1 before R4 verdict elevates to two simultaneous formal journal submissions; violation under JNT + JFR + Elsevier + Springer + AMS policies
discrepancies.resolution: REFINED — §D must add explicit gate: 'R1 → JFR fire conditional on R4 JNT verdict in hand (accept/reject/major-revision; minor-revision treated as still-active)'. arXiv deposit fires independently per preprint-and-formal-submission concurrency carve-out
discrepancies.downstream_impact: Day 14-21 §D cascade-deployment window: R1 fire is NOT structurally available at 60h pacing floor (2026-05-15 12:00 JST) per Q-208-4. Next journal fire pool restricted to redirect queue (ASB / PCF Log Ladder / V_quad NON) candidates
citations: verdict_208.md Section (iv) R1 JFR fire row

summary: Both discrepancies REFINED (no contradictions; synth strengthened drafter's plan with explicit constraints). No HIGH-severity items; no AEAL contamination.
